# Job Paul Automation & AI

> Freelance automation and AI consultant based in West Palm Beach, FL, working with local businesses across Palm Beach County and South Florida and remotely across the United States. Services: business-process automation (RPA, Python, PowerShell), AI-agent workflows, Excel and data-entry automation, and web-portal automation for systems with no API. Free written process audit within two business days; fixed-price quotes. Phone: (772) 621-6100 · Email: job@jobpaulautomation.com

Job Paul is a working automation engineer with ~20 production automations (estimate) running at an enterprise today, including a compliance-screening pipeline covering roughly 8,000 people per pass.
